summary: PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND (kind 30) dispatcher arm added to MarmotContext.tsx onApplicationMessage at line 601. Calls parseProfileRequestPayload, then unconditionally records via recordRequestEmitted (AC-032). Self-targeted requests sign + send via the publishProfileUpdate-pattern with no backoff (AC-030). Non-self requests delegate to handleIncomingProfileRequest stub (AC-031). Errors caught & console.warn'd. leaveGroup at line 1043 awaits clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId) before reloadGroups (AC-041). New file profileRequestRunner.ts is a non-breaking stub for story 06.
acceptance_criteria_satisfied: AC-030 — self-targeted reply: signerRef guard, localProfileRef.current, serialiseProfileUpdate→buildRumor→sendRumorSafe, no backoff, PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND outbound (lines 614-617)
AC-031 — non-self path delegates to handleIncomingProfileRequest with all args; sendRumor injection sends PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND when invoked (lines 621-632); no own profile rumor in this path
AC-032 — recordRequestEmitted called unconditionally before self/non-self branch (line 608)
AC-040 — story 01 round 2 strict author-binding guard at lines 571-577 still in place — not regressed
AC-041 — leaveGroup awaits clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId) at line 1043

files_changed.delta: Stub seam for story 06: handleIncomingProfileRequest (async no-op) + notifyProfileObserved (sync no-op). Imports only ProfileRequestPayload type. TODO(story-06) markers on both bodies. void args; suppression.

Lines 37-39: imports for PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND, parseProfileRequestPayload, recordRequestEmitted, clearProfileRequestMemos, handleIncomingProfileRequest. Lines 601-638: new PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND dispatcher arm. Line 1043: clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId) in leaveGroup.

test_counts.rationale_for_no_new_units: The PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND dispatcher arm is integration logic (subscription callback + IDB + signer) that is best exercised through E2E in story 07. Unit tests would require heavy mocking of marmot-ts, signer, and IDB without exercising the actual dispatch path. Story 07 covers the dispatcher behaviour end-to-end.

examiners_run.issue: stub signature carries selfPubkeyHex, absent from story 06 contract

decision: FAST PATH pass — max severity 3 < 7 threshold, all tests passing, tsc clean.
minor_findings_for_story_06: handleIncomingProfileRequest stub signature includes selfPubkeyHex parameter that is not in story 06's contract description in stories.json. The architect added it as a forward-compatibility pass-through. Story 06 may choose to (a) keep selfPubkeyHex (safe, dispatcher unchanged) or (b) drop it and update the dispatcher's call site. Both are acceptable; flagging as a seam decision for story 06 to make.
design_decisions_summary: Dispatcher arm sits inside the same onApplicationMessage callback as PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND, CHAT_MESSAGE_KIND, etc. — same structural pattern as kind 0.
recordRequestEmitted runs FIRST inside the truthy guard so peer-issued requests dedupe across the group. AC-032 is honoured for both self and non-self targets.

Target-side reply mirrors publishProfileUpdate exactly (signerRef.current + localProfileRef.current + serialiseProfileUpdate + buildRumor + sendRumorSafe). No backoff. PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND (kind 0) for outbound.

Non-self path uses an inline sendRumor injection that builds a PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND rumor — when story 06 invokes it, the relay payload will be sent as kind 0 under the relayer's MLS sender. The verified inner SignedProfileEvent.pubkey identifies the original author.

leaveGroup memo cleanup placed alongside the existing per-group clears (clearMemberScores, clearMemberProfiles, clearMessages, clearPollData, clearGroupMedia) and BEFORE reloadGroups + markBackupDirty — consistent ordering.
Race on recordRequestEmitted (concurrent IDB upserts for same key): benign — both transactions converge to max(lastRequestAt) and dedupe operates on the convergent value. No correctness impact.
out_of_scope_left_for_subsequent_stories: Story 05 — sweepStaleProfiles + app-start sweep + requestProfilesIfStale on context value + group-open sweep call from pages/groups.tsx

Story 06 — replace handleIncomingProfileRequest stub body with cached-event lookup + backoff + relay; replace notifyProfileObserved stub body with timer cancellation; wire notifyProfileObserved into PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND arm
Story 07 — full E2E for the six scenarios + helpers
